name: P90 | 二西莫夫
descriptionEn: Easily recognizable for its unique bullpup design, the P90 is a great weapon to shoot on the move due to its high-capacity magazine and low recoil. It has been custom painted with a sci-fi design. Anyone can predict the future... a visionary shapes it
descriptionZh: 因其独特的无托设计而更加容易辨认，多亏了 P90 高容量的弹匣和低后坐力，这把武器非常适合边移动边射击。 这把武器使用科幻设计进行了自定义涂装。 平凡人预测未来… 梦想家塑造未来
